extortion.description: You Are Number One at Benda, Grace, Stulz & Co. operates in the Certified Public Accountant business/industry within the Engineering, Accounting, Research, and Management Services sector. Their most valuable assets - our clients. And this company is ready to share 90gb of their data containing the data of their clients. We will upload corporate documents soon. Detailed client financials,a bit of employee personal information, NDA, credit card details, payment information, confidentiality agreements and so on.
